name: io.github.domdomegg/olio-volunteer-mcp
title: Olio Volunteer Hub
description: Browse and inspect Olio Food Waste Hero collections via the Volunteer Hub.

environmentVariables.name: OLIO_SESSION_ID
environmentVariables.description: Value of the `_session_id` cookie from a logged-in session at https://volunteers.olioex.com.

environmentVariables.name: OLIO_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Volunteer Hub (default: https://volunteers.olioex.com).
